headline.text: L3 ML1 fought nozzle clogs and a cooler trip for *5 hours* overnight before clearing at 06:01 — inclusion vacuum seized at *10:22* and is still down.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran caramel on S2 and S3 with routine breaks. S2 had a checkweigher sensor adjusted at 10:44, a heavy cream valve gasket replaced by 09:14, and a pipe leak reported at 13:50 with no follow-up. S3 caught a screw in an X-ray reject at 14:47, traced it to C22, and was back running at 14:59. S4 trial runs continued with Bequet caramel.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 is short on Hershey ZS Dark chocolate — needs 10k pounds, only has 8k in-house, waiting on a truck ETA from Blomer as of 10:09. ML3 went down at 08:42 on broken film and heavy glue residue with no resolution posted by window close. Hershey tour completed successfully at 10:07.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 had a rough overnight startup: nozzle clogs at 04:20 forced multiple cleaning cycles, mold cooling tripped at 06:40 (cleared by 06:45), and the line finally ran clean at 06:01. At 10:22 the inclusion vacuum stopped suctioning — maintenance is working it and it's still down. MFM stopped at 16:29 waiting for boxes 40951 in receiving with no update.

resolved.title: S3 C22 bolt missing, foreign object in Matrix 4 bag
resolved.summary: X-ray detected screw with washer in a Matrix 4 bag at 14:47; traced to missing bolt on C22 conveyor.
resolved.resolution: Line stopped, maintenance replaced bolt on C22, line back up at 14:59 — "Line is back up and running" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: S2 heavy cream valve leaking
resolved.summary: Kitchen valve for heavy cream was leaking, blocking caramel cook start at 08:52.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance replaced gasket by 09:14, production cleaned pipes/kettles, quality inspected — "Maintenance replaced the gasket" (Mariela Gudino).

resolved.title: S2 checkweigher photo eye not reading
resolved.summary: Photo eye sensor was not reading at the checkweigher; maintenance adjusted the sensor.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted sensor at 10:44 — "maintenance adjusted the sensor" (Victor Romero Sr.).

resolved.title: S3 guard door at risk of falling
resolved.summary: Guard door was not secure and at risk of falling down at 12:12.
resolved.resolution: Operators secured the door by 12:37 — "The door was not secure. Operators took care of it" (Katya Farnsworth).

resolved.title: S3 C-20 belt fraying
resolved.summary: Belt on Line C-20 showed fraying threads and lint during inspection at 13:32.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance took care of belt during a short line pause at 13:44 — "Maintenance has taken care of this while we did a short pause" (Nathan Topham).

resolved.title: ML1 nozzle clogging repeatedly
resolved.summary: Nozzles clogged starting at 04:20, forcing multiple cleaning cycles and hopper emptying; line couldn't deposit cleanly until 06:01.
resolved.resolution: Nozzles and cylinders cleaned, temperature raised to 120, line up and running at 06:01 — "We are up and running" (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: ML1 mold cooling tripped out
resolved.summary: Mold cooling system tripped at 06:40, all molds full of product, chocolate came out liquid.
resolved.resolution: Cooling system back running by 06:45 — "Mold cooling was tripped out but is now running" (Nathan Ruiz).

needs_attention.title: S2 pipe leaking
needs_attention.summary: One of the pipes is leaking, reported to maintenance at 13:50.
needs_attention.status: Reported to maintenance at 13:50, no follow-up posted.

needs_attention.title: S2 label machine wrinkled labels
needs_attention.summary: Label machine producing wrinkled labels at 15:03, Troy working on fix.
needs_attention.status: Troy fixing at 15:03, no resolution posted.

needs_attention.title: ML3 line down on broken film and heavy glue residue
needs_attention.summary: Line down at 08:42 due to broken film and heavy glue residue requiring cleanup.
needs_attention.status: Down as of 08:42, cleaning glue residue, no update posted.

needs_attention.title: Hershey ZS Dark chocolate shortage
needs_attention.summary: Scheduled for 10k pounds item 10228, only have 6k in system plus 2 totes to load — need 2k more pounds.
needs_attention.status: FTL due today per Martin Carlos at 10:09, waiting for ETA from Blomer — truck on the road but no arrival time.

needs_attention.title: ML1 inclusion vacuum not suctioning
needs_attention.summary: Inclusion vacuum stopped suctioning at 10:22, maintenance pulled to work on it.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on it as of 10:22, no resolution by window close at 10:23.

needs_attention.title: MFM waiting for boxes 40951
needs_attention.summary: Multi-format matrix stopped at 16:29 waiting for boxes 40951, which are in the receiving process.
needs_attention.status: Line stopped at 16:29 waiting on boxes in receiving, no update on arrival.
